title: Render the vet-market prose as bullets
guidance: Reward bullet(s) at the right density for a body slide — crisp and telegraphic but still parseable. The rater judges whether the density is right.

runner_input.instruction: Render the text below as a body-slide bullet or bullets.
runner_input.constraints: Output: a markdown bullet, or a series of bullets. You decide how many and how dense.

source_blocks.text: The serviceable market is around two hundred and seventy-one million pounds, growing at roughly nine percent a year, and the two incumbent vendors holding close to sixty percent of the market are still on-premise and have not shipped a major release in over four years, which together with a new 2025 clinical-record guideline creates an opening for a cloud-native challenger.

rubric_notes: Should become crisp bullets keeping £271m, 9%, 60% incumbent share, 2025 guideline.
